title: Gemwood tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Gemwood_tree.png|thumb|right|180px|[[Logray/Legends|Logray]] showing the Gemwood tree for Princess [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]].]]

The '''Gemwood tree''' was a tree with black wood, blue flowers, and orange-yellow frond leaves. It was a symbol of peace and equality to the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] people. One ounce of its wood was apparently worth more than anything else in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Flora-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 2|''Ewoks'' (1985) 2]]
